steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The example must name a species that was "entirely absent" — zero individuals observed — during the months stated. Check the graph for any species whose line sits on zero across the claimed period.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — barred flagtail in January of 2001.: the barred flagtail had roughly 13 individuals in January, not zero. ✗
  • Choice B — combtooth blenny in January of 2001.: the combtooth blenny had roughly 62 individuals in January. ✗
  • Choice C — barred flagtail in October of 2001.: the barred flagtail shows approximately 3 individuals in October. ✗
  • Choice D — three-lined rainbowfish in January, April, and July of 2001.: the three-lined rainbowfish line sits directly on zero across all three of these months. ✓
D is correct.
